articles.title: Investing in quality: The benefits of well-made furniture and art
articles.description:
Massachusetts designer Kate Maloney relies on locally made, quality pieces that can move from house to house. Here’s where to find some.

summary: Massachusetts designer Kate Maloney promotes locally made furniture for sustainability and quality.
Residents can find quality pieces that last and adapt to different homes.
Investing in local craftsmanship supports Boston's economy and reduces environmental impact.

articles.title: ‘He drives them’: New Bruins forward Lukas Reichel made an instant impact at TD Garden
articles.description:

His arrival is expected to boost Bruins' competitiveness in the ongoing season.

articles.title: Ask the Remodeler: How to keep melted snow out of your basement
articles.description:
A few expert tips for keeping your basement dry this spring.

summary: Experts recommend sealing cracks to prevent melted snow from entering basements this spring.
Install sump pumps and drainage systems to manage water effectively during snowmelt.
Homeowners can avoid costly water damage by implementing these preventative measures.
